summary: Iteration 82 backend testing completed successfully. All 22 tests passed (100%). Tested the complete 'Rientro Conto Lavoro' (return from subcontracting) workflow including: POST rientro with multipart form data, state validation (requires 'inviato' or 'in_lavorazione'), PATCH verifica for closure, NCR PDF generation for non-conformity, and certificate upload. All features working as expected.
test_credentials: Test users, commesse, suppliers created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with conto_lavoro items, production phases (fasi_produzione), and suppliers created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 adds Rientro Conto Lavoro workflow. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/rientro (multipart form with data_rientro, ddt_fornitore_numero, peso_rientrato_kg, esito_qc, certificato_file), PATCH /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/verifica (auto-completes production phase, links certificate to documenti), GET /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/ncr-pdf (generates Non-Conformity Report PDF). State validation enforced: rientro only allowed when stato='inviato' or 'in_lavorazione', verifica only when stato='rientrato'. Frontend has data-testid='cl-rientro-{cl_id}' and 'cl-verifica-{cl_id}' buttons.

create_conto_lavoro_verniciatura.details: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro creates C/L with tipo, fornitore, RAL, righe

rientro_state_validation.details: POST rientro returns 400 when C/L stato is 'da_inviare' (requires 'inviato' or 'in_lavorazione')

rientro_conforme_without_file.details: POST rientro with esito_qc='conforme' works without certificate file, changes stato to 'rientrato'

rientro_non_conforme_with_file.details: POST rientro with esito_qc='non_conforme', motivo_non_conformita, and certificato_file upload works correctly

rientro_from_in_lavorazione.details: POST rientro works when C/L stato is 'in_lavorazione' (alternative valid state)

ncr_pdf_success.details: GET /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/ncr-pdf returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf

ncr_pdf_contains_data.details: NCR PDF generated >1KB with proper PDF header

ncr_pdf_not_found.details: GET ncr-pdf returns 404 for non-existent cl_id

verifica_fails_when_not_rientrato.details: PATCH verifica returns 400 when C/L stato is not 'rientrato'

verifica_success.details: PATCH verifica changes stato to 'verificato' and closes C/L

verifica_non_conforme_cl.details: PATCH verifica works for non_conforme C/L (allows closure even with non-conformity)

certificate_linkage.details: Uploaded certificate stored in C/L record (certificato_rientro_base64, certificato_rientro_filename)

regression_cl_update.details: Standard PUT /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id} still works for status updates

steps: 1. Create C/L with tipo, fornitore, righe (POST /conto-lavoro) → stato='da_inviare'
3. Register return (POST /conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/rientro) → stato='rientrato', stores all rientro fields
4. Verify and close (PATCH /conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/verifica) → stato='verificato', auto-completes production phase, links certificate
